user_agents.name: OAI-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface websites in search results in ChatGPT's search features
user_agents.scope: Search index crawling for ChatGPT search results
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: OAI-SearchBot / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: GPTBot
user_agents.purpose: Crawl content for training generative AI foundation models
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for training data collection
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: GPTBot / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: OAI-AdsBot
user_agents.purpose: Validate safety and relevance of web pages submitted as ads on ChatGPT
user_agents.scope: User-submitted ad landing pages only
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: OAI-AdsBot / Disallow: / (data not used for model training)

user_agents.name: ChatGPT-User
user_agents.purpose: User-initiated actions in ChatGPT and Custom GPTs
user_agents.scope: User-triggered web page fetches and GPT Actions interactions
user_agents.opt_out: robots.txt rules may not apply; triggered by user actions

user_agents.name: ClaudeBot
user_agents.purpose: Collect web content for AI model training and development
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for training datasets
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: ClaudeBot / Disallow: / (honors robots.txt directives and Crawl-delay)

user_agents.name: Claude-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user-initiated web access when Claude users ask questions
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch for live responses to Claude queries
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Claude-User / Disallow: / (site owners can control access via robots.txt)

user_agents.name: Claude-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Search web and improve search result quality for users
user_agents.scope: Web crawl for search indexing and relevance optimization
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Claude-SearchBot / Disallow: / (honors robots.txt to prevent indexing)

user_agents.name: Googlebot
user_agents.purpose: Build Google Search indexes and power Google Search features
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for search indexing, affects Search, Images, Video, News, Discover

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Image
user_agents.purpose: Index images for Google Images and Search features
user_agents.scope: Image-specific crawling for Google Images, Discover, Video, and image presentations in Search

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Video
user_agents.purpose: Index videos for video-related search features
user_agents.scope: Video-specific crawling for video-related Google Search features and products dependent on videos

user_agents.name: Googlebot-News
user_agents.purpose: Index content for Google News product
user_agents.scope: News content crawling for Google News product including news.google.com and Google News app

user_agents.name: Storebot-Google
user_agents.purpose: Crawl product information for Google Shopping
user_agents.scope: E-commerce specific crawl for Google Shopping surfaces including Shopping tab and Google Shopping

user_agents.name: Google-InspectionTool
user_agents.purpose: Test and validate markup for Search Console testing tools
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch for Rich Result Test and URL inspection in Search Console

user_agents.name: GoogleOther
user_agents.purpose: Generic crawling for various Google product teams
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for internal R&D and one-off product-team crawls, no specific product impact

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Image
user_agents.purpose: Generic image crawling optimized for image URLs
user_agents.scope: Image-specific crawl for various internal uses, no specific product impact

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Video
user_agents.purpose: Generic video crawling optimized for video URLs
user_agents.scope: Video-specific crawl for various internal uses, no specific product impact

user_agents.name: Google-CloudVertexBot
user_agents.purpose: Crawl content for building Vertex AI Agents requested by site owners
user_agents.scope: Site-owner requested crawl for Vertex AI Agents, affects only agent-specific applications

user_agents.name: Google-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Control whether crawled content may be used for training Gemini models
user_agents.scope: Robots.txt token for managing Gemini training data and grounding, does not impact Search ranking

user_agents.name: PerplexityBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface and link websites in search results on Perplexity
user_agents.scope: Search indexing for Perplexity results; not used for training AI foundation models
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow PerplexityBot in robots.txt file; block published IP ranges

user_agents.name: Perplexity-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user-triggered fetches when users ask Perplexity questions
user_agents.scope: User-requested web page visits to help provide accurate answers; not for web crawling or training data collection
user_agents.opt_out: Blocks based on user request origin; generally ignores robots.txt rules per user action

user_agents.name: Applebot
user_agents.purpose: Powers search, Spotlight, Siri, and Safari features across Apple's ecosystem
user_agents.scope: General web crawling for search indexing and content discovery
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow: / under User-agent: Applebot in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Applebot-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Determines content usage for training Apple foundation models and generative AI features
user_agents.scope: Metadata analysis of already-crawled content for AI model training
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow: / under User-agent: Applebot-Extended in robots.txt

user_agents.name: iTMS
user_agents.purpose: Crawls URLs associated with registered content on Apple Podcasts
user_agents.scope: Apple Podcasts specific crawling; does not follow robots.txt

user_agents.name: FacebookExternalHit
user_agents.purpose: Crawls content shared on Meta family apps to gather title, description, thumbnail
user_agents.scope: Content from websites or apps shared on Facebook, Instagram, or Messenger
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: facebookexternalhit / Disallow: / (in robots.txt). Note: may bypass for security checks.

user_agents.name: Meta-WebIndexer
user_agents.purpose: Improves Meta AI search result quality and relevance
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to enhance Meta AI citation and linking capabilities
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-webindexer / Disallow: / (in robots.txt)

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAds
user_agents.purpose: Crawls web for advertising and business-related products and services
user_agents.scope: Web content for improving advertising and business offerings
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalads / Disallow: / (in robots.txt)

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAgent
user_agents.purpose: Training foundation AI models and improving products by indexing content
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for AI model training and product improvement
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalagent / Disallow: / (in robots.txt)

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalFetcher
user_agents.purpose: Fetches individual links at user request for agentic AI evaluation and improvement
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch to support AI navigation and task completion
user_agents.opt_out: May bypass robots.txt; user-initiated requests only

user_agents.name: MicrosoftBot
user_agents.purpose: General web crawling for Bing search and indexing
user_agents.scope: Broad web crawl for search engine index updates
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: MicrosoftBot / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: Bingbot
user_agents.purpose: Bing search engine crawling and indexing
user_agents.scope: Web pages for Bing search results
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Bingbot / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: AdIdxBot
user_agents.purpose: Advertising and content analysis for Bing Ads
user_agents.scope: Web pages for ad targeting and relevance
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: AdIdxBot / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: BingPreview
user_agents.purpose: Preview and snapshot generation for search results
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch for hover previews in Bing
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: BingPreview / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: Amazonbot
user_agents.purpose: Improve products and services, provide accurate customer information, train Amazon AI models
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for AI model training and product improvement
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amazonbot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; honors industry standard opt-out directives

user_agents.name: Amzn-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Improve search experiences in Amazon products and services like Alexa and Rufus
user_agents.scope: Web crawl for search indexing; does not crawl for generative AI model training
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amzn-SearchBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; honors industry standard opt-out directives

user_agents.name: Amzn-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user-triggered actions like responding to Alexa queries requiring up-to-date information
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetches for live information to provide accurate answers on behalf of users
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amzn-User / Disallow: / in robots.txt; honors industry standard opt-out directives

user_agents.name: CCBot/2.0
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for Common Crawl's internet archive dataset
user_agents.scope: General web crawl of randomly selected subset of websites, follows robots.txt and sitemaps
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: CCBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: CCBot/1.0
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for Common Crawl's internet archive dataset (legacy)
user_agents.scope: General web crawl, older version of CCBot crawler
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: CCBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file
